Notes / Evidence status:

3f2c945b-f287-432d-b1f6-0bdfd561ea11.title: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

details.mandate: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

318b19ee-8c72-4b1c-ba17-5cb526722547.title: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link domain, and citation

details.intent: Retrieve the page source of https://example.com and extract (1) the exact H1 text as rendered on the page, (2) the exact domain of the external link present on the page, and (3) the page citation (the exact URL visited).
target_facts: h1_text: exact H1 text from the page (string)
external_link_url: exact href of the primary external link found on the page (string)
external_link_domain: exact domain portion of that external link (string)
citation: the exact URL used to cite this page (string)
details.extraction_plan: Visit the exact URL. Parse the returned HTML/text to find the first <h1> element and capture its text exactly (including capitalization and punctuation). Find external link(s) on the page (anchor tags whose host is different from example.com); if multiple, capture the first visible link; record the exact href string and then extract the domain portion exactly as present in the href. Record the citation as the exact visited URL (https://example.com). Save any raw snippet or _links_inline results for verification.
verification_steps: Confirm the captured H1 exactly matches the text in the page response (character-for-character).
Confirm the external link href appears in the page's links section or inline link list (verify against _links_inline if present).
Confirm the extracted domain is the domain portion of the exact href (no normalization beyond extracting host).
details.why_needed: This node directly fulfills two of the main asks: the exact H1 text and the exact domain of the external link from example.com, plus a citation for the page. Visiting the exact URL ensures accurate, verifiable extraction rather than relying on pre-trained knowledge.
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link domain, and citation
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and extract H1, external link domain, and citation
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

action_result.intent: Retrieve the page source of https://example.com and extract (1) the exact H1 text as rendered on the page, (2) the exact domain of the external link present on the page, and (3) the page citation (the exact URL visited).

944e107f-08df-4c1c-8f00-a7d00ebfac41.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture one URL citation

details.intent: Visit the IANA 'Reserved Domains' page and produce one exact URL citation for that visited page (the exact URL used to cite the page).
target_facts: citation: the exact URL used to cite this page (string)
details.extraction_plan: Visit the exact URL and record the canonical URL returned (the exact string to be used as the citation). Optionally capture the page title or H1 for quick verification, but the required measurable output is the citation URL.
verification_steps: Confirm the recorded citation is the exact URL visited (character-for-character).
If the page redirects, capture the final (post-redirect) URL as the citation and note the redirect chain for verification.
details.why_needed: The mandate explicitly requests one URL citation for each visited page. Visiting the canonical IANA page ensures an authoritative citation is captured.
details.goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture one URL citation
details.original_goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture one URL citation
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

5416ef64-eef5-4f79-bc86-f425fb03b442.title: Consolidate and verify extracted data from visits

details.intent: After both visits complete, consolidate the outputs (example.com H1, example.com external link domain and href, and both pages' citations). Run verification checks and prepare a clean, minimal set of outputs matching the mandate.
tasks: Receive visit results for example.com and iana.reserved.
Verify H1 text is present and matches the extracted string.
Verify the external link href for example.com appears in the page and extract the domain exactly.
Ensure there is exactly one citation string for each visited page and that it is the final URL after redirects (if any).
Prepare the final return values in the exact requested form: (1) exact H1 text from example.com, (2) exact domain of the external link from example.com, (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
verification_steps: Character-for-character match checks between stored snippets and final outputs.
If any ambiguity (multiple H1s or multiple external links), choose the first visible instance and document the decision.
details.why_needed: This ensures the data returned is internally consistent, verified against the raw visit outputs, and formatted exactly as requested before saving or returning.
details.goal: Consolidate and verify extracted data from visits
details.original_goal: Consolidate and verify extracted data from visits
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

details.intent: Store the consolidated, verified results so they are available for subsequent steps or retrieval.

data_fields_to_save.example_h1: string — exact H1 text from https://example.com
data_fields_to_save.example_external_link_url: string — exact href captured from example.com
data_fields_to_save.example_external_link_domain: string — exact domain portion of the external link
data_fields_to_save.citation_example: string — citation URL for https://example.com (exact visited/final URL)
data_fields_to_save.citation_iana: string — citation URL for https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved (exact visited/final URL)

verification_steps: Confirm the saved values match the consolidated outputs from the think node exactly.
Return a success flag and the stored keys for future reference.
details.why_needed: Persisting the verified outputs makes them retrievable for later actions and satisfies the user's prior memory-save attempts noted in the path. Uses the provided memo namespace for consistency.
